title: Remove GraphNode model and related control-plane cruft

comments.author: ryan
comments.text: Starting GraphNode removal implementation on a fresh feature branch from develop. Scope: remove GraphNode schema/UI/MCP/runtime/metrics surfaces while keeping schema index changes to one index per surviving table.

comments.author: ryan
comments.text: Investigating staging Amplify job 118 failure: backend synth/typecheck passed, but CDK asset publish failed for ConsoleRunWorkerStack Template (current_account-current_region) before CloudFormation update. Fixing stack env resolution so staging can reach schema deployment validation.

comments.author: ryan
comments.text: Patched dashboard/amplify/backend.ts to force explicit env on ConsoleRunWorkerStack (account/region from CDK_DEFAULT_* with AWS_* fallback) and fail fast if unresolved, so CDK does not synthesize current_account-current_region during staging deploy.

comments.author: ryan
comments.text: Staging job 119 failed before deploy on backend type-check: workerImageUri passed in backend.ts but ConsoleRunWorkerStackProps in staging branch lacks that field. Preparing follow-up staging commit to align backend.ts and consoleRunWorker/resource.ts so deploy can proceed to CloudFormation.

comments.author: ryan
comments.text: Job 120 failure isolated: staging branch env is missing CONSOLE_WORKER_IMAGE_URI. Next action: update Amplify staging branch environment variable to match main and rerun deploy to validate CloudFormation/schema change path.

comments.author: ryan
comments.text: Job 121 failure root cause: cross-environment reference requires explicit physical name for ConsoleRunWorkerQueue. Implementing explicit queue names (queue + DLQ) in ConsoleRunWorkerStack and redeploying staging.

comments.author: ryan
comments.text: Job 122 failure: cross-environment reference now on startConsoleRun-lambda ServiceRole. Next fix: move ConsoleRunWorkerStack to NestedStack under backend.stack and remove explicit env wiring to keep all references same-environment.

comments.author: ryan
comments.text: Performed targeted staging->feature reconciliation by cherry-picking today's staging commits. GraphNode/schema commit was already present (empty pick skipped). Applied staging-aligned backend deltas for console worker env/queue/nested-stack behavior onto feature branch.
